_claim: Q3 — E_n * P_n approximate invariant across hydrogen levels

Rydberg_eV.source: CODATA 2018 (Rydberg energy Ry = m_e * c^2 * alpha^2 / 2, where alpha is the fine-structure constant)

Rydberg_eV_rounded.source: Conventional 3-sig-fig approximation used in the session brief and gcm_v2.md

P_n.source: FCC / tetrahedrally close-packed coordination-shell count; matches OEIS A005901 (starting at shell n=1 = 12) and gcm_v2.md §H7

fcc_standard_sequence_crosscheck.note: Sequence OEIS A005901 starts with 1 (the central atom). Terms n>=1 are 10n^2 + 2.
